official_name: American Institute of Certified Public Accountants
alternate_names: Association of International Certified Professional Accountants
notes: AICPA publishes the Trust Services Criteria (TSC), the framework underlying SOC 2 and SOC 3 attestation reports. SOC 1 uses a different framework (focused on internal controls over financial reporting) and is out of scope here. AICPA merged operationally with CIMA in 2017 and now operates as the Association of International Certified Professional Accountants, but the AICPA brand and TSC publication continue under aicpa-cima.org.
